tables.table_title: Overview of included studies on health statue utility values

groups.notes: Phase 1/2 single-arm; R/R PMBCL; nivolumab + brentuximab vedotin; EQ-5D-3L
Phase 2b single-arm; R/R DLBCL 2+ prior lines; selinexor; EQ-5D-5L health index
Phase 2 single-arm; 3L+ DLBCL (Cohorts 3-6) and safety management study; axi-cel; EQ-5D-5L VAS and health index
Phase 1 single-arm; R/R DLBCL 2+ prior lines; liso-cel; EQ-5D-5L health index and VAS
Phase 2 single-arm; 2L and heavily pre-treated R/R DLBCL; naratuximab emtansine + rituximab; EQ-5D unspecified
Vignette-based study; general adult population UK; EQ-5D-5L health index and VAS; not a clinical trial
Vignette-based study; general adult population UK; TTO 1-year horizon; disutilities for CRS and NE AEs; not a clinical trial

warnings: Howell 2022 [44] and Howell 2020 [43] are vignette-based studies using a general population sample, not clinical trials; flagged needs_review=true per inclusion criteria.
ZUMA-1 safety management study cohort (ClinicalTrials.gov [70]) is a separate sub-population row from the main ZUMA-1 Cohorts 3-6 row but shares the same trial; consolidated under one group.
